option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: Build
on: workflow_dispatch: push: paths: - "src/**" - "includes/**" - "CMakeLists.txt" - ".github/workflows/build.yml" pull_request: paths: - "src/**" - "includes/**" - "CMakeLists.txt" - ".github/workflows/build.yml"
jobs: build: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Configure CMake run: cmake -S . -B cmake-build-ci -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release
- name: Build run: cmake --build cmake-build-ci -j

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: Unit Tests
on: workflow_dispatch: push: paths: - "src/**" - "includes/**" - "CMakeLists.txt" - "src/test/**" - ".github/workflows/unit-tests.yml" pull_request: paths: - "src/**" - "includes/**" - "CMakeLists.txt" - "src/test/**" - ".github/workflows/unit-tests.yml"
jobs: unit-tests: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Configure CMake run: cmake -S . -B cmake-build-ci -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release
- name: Build run: cmake --build cmake-build-ci -j
- name: Run unit tests run: ctest --test-dir cmake-build-ci --output-on-failure

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# term4k [Chinese documentation / 中文文档](documents/README_zh_CN.md)

## Documentation - [Architecture Overview](documents/ARCHITECTURE.md) term4k is a terminal-based rhythm game project written in C++20. It includes: - chart parsing and gameplay timing logic - user/account data management - per-user runtime configuration persistence - localization support (`en_US`, `zh_CN`) - unit tests for core modules ## Live Code Statistics > Auto-updated by `.github/workflows/readme-stats.yml`. > Chart theme preset: `dark` + `default`. > Switch quickly: `python3 scripts/update_readme_stats.py --theme light --style neon`. | Metric | Value | | --- | ---: | | Total code lines | `10,854` | | Class/Struct definitions (C++) | `86` | | Function definitions (C++, heuristic) | `414` | | Stack object declarations (C++, heuristic) | `392` | | Static variable declarations (C++, heuristic) | `16` | | Heap allocations via `new` (C++, heuristic) | `0` | | `make_shared`/`make_unique` calls (C++, heuristic) | `1` | ### Distribution Chart ```mermaid %%{init: {'theme': 'base', 'themeVariables': {'fontFamily': 'Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, Source Code Pro, Cascadia Code, Menlo, Consolas, monospace', 'pieTitleTextColor': '#e5e7eb', 'pieSectionTextColor': '#f3f4f6', 'pieOuterStrokeColor': 'transparent', 'pieOuterStrokeWidth': '0px', 'pieStrokeColor': 'transparent', 'pieStrokeWidth': '0px', 'pie1': '#6366f1', 'pie2': '#22d3ee', 'pie3': '#34d399', 'pie4': '#fbbf24', 'pie5': '#fb7185', 'pie6': '#a78bfa'}}}%% pie showData title Code Distribution by Language (LOC) "C++ (86.9%)" : 9432 "Markdown (6.2%)" : 672 "Shell (3.9%)" : 422 "CMake (2.3%)" : 252 "JSON (0.7%)" : 76 ``` ## Install (Recommended) Use the installer script in the project root: ```bash ./install.sh ``` The script will: 1. configure and build a Release package with CMake/CPack 2. detect your package manager (`apt`, `dnf`, `yum`, or `zypper`) 3. install the generated package automatically 4. fall back to `cmake --install` when no supported package manager is found After installation: ```bash term4k ``` ## Remote Install (No Full Clone) If you only download script files via `curl` or `wget`, install with: ```bash curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/install.sh" -o install.sh sh install.sh --source-url "https://github.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz" ``` ```bash wget -qO install.sh "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/install.sh" sh install.sh --source-url "https://github.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz" ``` ## Uninstall To completely remove term4k from your system: ```bash ./uninstall.sh ``` Use non-interactive mode when needed: ```bash ./uninstall.sh --yes ``` Safe mode (remove program only, keep user data): ```bash ./uninstall.sh --keep-user-data ``` Remote uninstall (no clone): ```bash curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/uninstall.sh" -o uninstall.sh sh uninstall.sh --yes --keep-user-data ``` ```bash wget -qO uninstall.sh "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/uninstall.sh" sh uninstall.sh --yes --keep-user-data ``` ## Update Local update: ```bash ./update.sh ``` Remote update (no clone): ```bash curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/update.sh" -o update.sh sh update.sh --install-script-url "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/install.sh" --source-url "https://github.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz" ``` ```bash wget -qO update.sh "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/update.sh" sh update.sh --install-script-url "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/install.sh" --source-url "https://github.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz" ``` ## Manual Build (Optional) ```bash cmake -S . -B cmake-build-release -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release cmake --build cmake-build-release -j ./cmake-build-release/term4k ``` ## Packaging Options By default, CPack generates DEB packages. RPM generation is controlled by `TERM4K_ENABLE_RPM` and requires `rpmbuild`. ```bash # DEB only cmake -S . -B cmake-build-release -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DTERM4K_ENABLE_RPM=OFF cmake --build cmake-build-release --target package -j ``` ```bash # DEB + RPM (when rpmbuild is available) cmake -S . -B cmake-build-release -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DTERM4K_ENABLE_RPM=ON cmake --build cmake-build-release --target package -j ``` ```bash # CI strict mode: fail configure if RPM is requested but rpmbuild is missing cmake -S . -B cmake-build-release -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DTERM4K_ENABLE_RPM=ON -DTERM4K_STRICT_RPM_CHECK=ON cmake --build cmake-build-release --target package -j ```

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# term4k [Chinese documentation / 中文文档](documents/README_zh_CN.md)

CI Status

Project Meta

Code Stats

## Documentation - [Architecture Overview](documents/ARCHITECTURE.md) term4k is a terminal-based rhythm game project written in C++20. It includes: - chart parsing and gameplay timing logic - user/account data management - per-user runtime configuration persistence - localization support (`en_US`, `zh_CN`) - unit tests for core modules ## Live Code Statistics > Auto-updated by `.github/workflows/readme-stats.yml`. > Chart theme preset: `dark` + `default`. > Switch quickly: `python3 scripts/update_readme_stats.py --theme light --style neon`. | Metric | Value | | --- | ---: | | Total code lines | `10,854` | | Class/Struct definitions (C++) | `86` | | Function definitions (C++, heuristic) | `414` | | Stack object declarations (C++, heuristic) | `392` | | Static variable declarations (C++, heuristic) | `16` | | Heap allocations via `new` (C++, heuristic) | `0` | | `make_shared`/`make_unique` calls (C++, heuristic) | `1` | ### Distribution Chart ```mermaid %%{init: {'theme': 'base', 'themeVariables': {'fontFamily': 'Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, Source Code Pro, Cascadia Code, Menlo, Consolas, monospace', 'pieTitleTextColor': '#e5e7eb', 'pieSectionTextColor': '#f3f4f6', 'pieOuterStrokeColor': 'transparent', 'pieOuterStrokeWidth': '0px', 'pieStrokeColor': 'transparent', 'pieStrokeWidth': '0px', 'pie1': '#6366f1', 'pie2': '#22d3ee', 'pie3': '#34d399', 'pie4': '#fbbf24', 'pie5': '#fb7185', 'pie6': '#a78bfa'}}}%% pie showData title Code Distribution by Language (LOC) "C++ (86.9%)" : 9432 "Markdown (6.2%)" : 672 "Shell (3.9%)" : 422 "CMake (2.3%)" : 252 "JSON (0.7%)" : 76 ``` ## Install (Recommended) Use the installer script in the project root: ```bash ./install.sh ``` The script will: 1. configure and build a Release package with CMake/CPack 2. detect your package manager (`apt`, `dnf`, `yum`, or `zypper`) 3. install the generated package automatically 4. fall back to `cmake --install` when no supported package manager is found After installation: ```bash term4k ``` ## Remote Install (No Full Clone) If you only download script files via `curl` or `wget`, install with: ```bash curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/install.sh" -o install.sh sh install.sh --source-url "https://github.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz" ``` ```bash wget -qO install.sh "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/install.sh" sh install.sh --source-url "https://github.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz" ``` ## Uninstall To completely remove term4k from your system: ```bash ./uninstall.sh ``` Use non-interactive mode when needed: ```bash ./uninstall.sh --yes ``` Safe mode (remove program only, keep user data): ```bash ./uninstall.sh --keep-user-data ``` Remote uninstall (no clone): ```bash curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/uninstall.sh" -o uninstall.sh sh uninstall.sh --yes --keep-user-data ``` ```bash wget -qO uninstall.sh "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/uninstall.sh" sh uninstall.sh --yes --keep-user-data ``` ## Update Local update: ```bash ./update.sh ``` Remote update (no clone): ```bash curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/update.sh" -o update.sh sh update.sh --install-script-url "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/install.sh" --source-url "https://github.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz" ``` ```bash wget -qO update.sh "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/update.sh" sh update.sh --install-script-url "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/install.sh" --source-url "https://github.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz" ``` ## Manual Build (Optional) ```bash cmake -S . -B cmake-build-release -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release cmake --build cmake-build-release -j ./cmake-build-release/term4k ``` ## Packaging Options By default, CPack generates DEB packages. RPM generation is controlled by `TERM4K_ENABLE_RPM` and requires `rpmbuild`. ```bash # DEB only cmake -S . -B cmake-build-release -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DTERM4K_ENABLE_RPM=OFF cmake --build cmake-build-release --target package -j ``` ```bash # DEB + RPM (when rpmbuild is available) cmake -S . -B cmake-build-release -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DTERM4K_ENABLE_RPM=ON cmake --build cmake-build-release --target package -j ``` ```bash # CI strict mode: fail configure if RPM is requested but rpmbuild is missing cmake -S . -B cmake-build-release -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DTERM4K_ENABLE_RPM=ON -DTERM4K_STRICT_RPM_CHECK=ON cmake --build cmake-build-release --target package -j ```

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# term4k（中文说明） [English documentation / 英文文档](../README.md)

## 文档导航 - [架构与模块分工](./ARCHITECTURE_zh_CN.md) term4k 是一个基于 C++20 的终端节奏游戏项目。 主要能力包括： - 谱面解析与节奏时序逻辑 - 用户/账户数据管理 - 用户级运行配置持久化 - 多语言支持（`en_US`、`zh_CN`） - 核心模块单元测试 ## 实时代码统计 > 由 `.github/workflows/readme-stats.yml` 自动更新。 > 当前图表主题：`dark` + `default`。 > 快速切换：`python3 scripts/update_readme_stats.py --theme light --style neon`。 | 指标 | 数值 | | --- | ---: | | 代码总行数 | `10,854` | | 类/结构体定义数量（C++） | `86` | | 函数定义数量（C++，启发式） | `414` | | 栈对象声明数量（C++，启发式） | `392` | | 静态变量声明数量（C++，启发式） | `16` | | `new` 堆分配次数（C++，启发式） | `0` | | `make_shared`/`make_unique` 调用次数（C++，启发式） | `1` | ### 分布图 ```mermaid %%{init: {'theme': 'base', 'themeVariables': {'fontFamily': 'Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, Source Code Pro, Cascadia Code, Menlo, Consolas, monospace', 'pieTitleTextColor': '#e5e7eb', 'pieSectionTextColor': '#f3f4f6', 'pieOuterStrokeColor': 'transparent', 'pieOuterStrokeWidth': '0px', 'pieStrokeColor': 'transparent', 'pieStrokeWidth': '0px', 'pie1': '#6366f1', 'pie2': '#22d3ee', 'pie3': '#34d399', 'pie4': '#fbbf24', 'pie5': '#fb7185', 'pie6': '#a78bfa'}}}%% pie showData title Code Distribution by Language (LOC) "C++ (86.9%)" : 9432 "Markdown (6.2%)" : 672 "Shell (3.9%)" : 422 "CMake (2.3%)" : 252 "JSON (0.7%)" : 76 ``` ## 安装（推荐） 在项目根目录执行： ```bash ./install.sh ``` 脚本会自动： 1. 使用 CMake/CPack 进行 Release 构建和打包 2. 检测系统包管理器（`apt`、`dnf`、`yum`、`zypper`） 3. 安装生成的软件包 4. 在不支持的环境下回退到 `cmake --install` 安装完成后运行： ```bash term4k ``` ## 远程安装（无需完整克隆仓库） 仅下载脚本也可完成安装： ```bash curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/install.sh" -o install.sh sh install.sh --source-url "https://github.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz" ``` ```bash wget -qO install.sh "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/install.sh" sh install.sh --source-url "https://github.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz" ``` ## 卸载 彻底卸载（包含程序与用户数据）： ```bash ./uninstall.sh ``` 无交互模式： ```bash ./uninstall.sh --yes ``` 安全模式（仅卸载程序，保留用户数据）： ```bash ./uninstall.sh --keep-user-data ``` 远程卸载（无需克隆仓库）： ```bash curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/uninstall.sh" -o uninstall.sh sh uninstall.sh --yes --keep-user-data ``` ```bash wget -qO uninstall.sh "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/uninstall.sh" sh uninstall.sh --yes --keep-user-data ``` ## 更新 本地更新： ```bash ./update.sh ``` 远程更新（无需克隆仓库）： ```bash curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/update.sh" -o update.sh sh update.sh --install-script-url "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/install.sh" --source-url "https://github.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz" ``` ```bash wget -qO update.sh "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/update.sh" sh update.sh --install-script-url "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/install.sh" --source-url "https://github.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz" ``` ## 手动构建（可选） ```bash cmake -S . -B cmake-build-release -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release cmake --build cmake-build-release -j ./cmake-build-release/term4k ```

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# term4k（中文说明） [English documentation / 英文文档](../README.md)

CI 状态

项目信息

代码统计

## 文档导航 - [架构与模块分工](./ARCHITECTURE_zh_CN.md) term4k 是一个基于 C++20 的终端节奏游戏项目。 主要能力包括： - 谱面解析与节奏时序逻辑 - 用户/账户数据管理 - 用户级运行配置持久化 - 多语言支持（`en_US`、`zh_CN`） - 核心模块单元测试 ## 实时代码统计 > 由 `.github/workflows/readme-stats.yml` 自动更新。 > 当前图表主题：`dark` + `default`。 > 快速切换：`python3 scripts/update_readme_stats.py --theme light --style neon`。 | 指标 | 数值 | | --- | ---: | | 代码总行数 | `10,854` | | 类/结构体定义数量（C++） | `86` | | 函数定义数量（C++，启发式） | `414` | | 栈对象声明数量（C++，启发式） | `392` | | 静态变量声明数量（C++，启发式） | `16` | | `new` 堆分配次数（C++，启发式） | `0` | | `make_shared`/`make_unique` 调用次数（C++，启发式） | `1` | ### 分布图 ```mermaid %%{init: {'theme': 'base', 'themeVariables': {'fontFamily': 'Fira Code, JetBrains Mono, Source Code Pro, Cascadia Code, Menlo, Consolas, monospace', 'pieTitleTextColor': '#e5e7eb', 'pieSectionTextColor': '#f3f4f6', 'pieOuterStrokeColor': 'transparent', 'pieOuterStrokeWidth': '0px', 'pieStrokeColor': 'transparent', 'pieStrokeWidth': '0px', 'pie1': '#6366f1', 'pie2': '#22d3ee', 'pie3': '#34d399', 'pie4': '#fbbf24', 'pie5': '#fb7185', 'pie6': '#a78bfa'}}}%% pie showData title Code Distribution by Language (LOC) "C++ (86.9%)" : 9432 "Markdown (6.2%)" : 672 "Shell (3.9%)" : 422 "CMake (2.3%)" : 252 "JSON (0.7%)" : 76 ``` ## 安装（推荐） 在项目根目录执行： ```bash ./install.sh ``` 脚本会自动： 1. 使用 CMake/CPack 进行 Release 构建和打包 2. 检测系统包管理器（`apt`、`dnf`、`yum`、`zypper`） 3. 安装生成的软件包 4. 在不支持的环境下回退到 `cmake --install` 安装完成后运行： ```bash term4k ``` ## 远程安装（无需完整克隆仓库） 仅下载脚本也可完成安装： ```bash curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/install.sh" -o install.sh sh install.sh --source-url "https://github.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz" ``` ```bash wget -qO install.sh "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/install.sh" sh install.sh --source-url "https://github.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz" ``` ## 卸载 彻底卸载（包含程序与用户数据）： ```bash ./uninstall.sh ``` 无交互模式： ```bash ./uninstall.sh --yes ``` 安全模式（仅卸载程序，保留用户数据）： ```bash ./uninstall.sh --keep-user-data ``` 远程卸载（无需克隆仓库）： ```bash curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/uninstall.sh" -o uninstall.sh sh uninstall.sh --yes --keep-user-data ``` ```bash wget -qO uninstall.sh "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/uninstall.sh" sh uninstall.sh --yes --keep-user-data ``` ## 更新 本地更新： ```bash ./update.sh ``` 远程更新（无需克隆仓库）： ```bash curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/update.sh" -o update.sh sh update.sh --install-script-url "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/install.sh" --source-url "https://github.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz" ``` ```bash wget -qO update.sh "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/update.sh" sh update.sh --install-script-url "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/main/shell/install.sh" --source-url "https://github.com/TheBadRoger/term4k/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz" ``` ## 手动构建（可选） ```bash cmake -S . -B cmake-build-release -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release cmake --build cmake-build-release -j ./cmake-build-release/term4k ```

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
# term4k 模块分层说明
本项目已按以下层级组织（从底层到上层）：
`(utils / entities / config) -> dao -> services -> instances -> ui`
## 1. 分层规则
- 允许：同层包含；后层包含前层（例如 `services` 可以包含 `dao/entities/utils`）。 - 禁止：前层包含后层（例如 `dao` 不能包含 `services`）。 - 建议：UI 仅通过 `instances` 与后端交互。
### 允许依赖矩阵
- `utils` -> `utils`, `entities`, `config` - `entities` -> `entities`, `utils`, `config` - `config` -> `config`, `utils`, `entities` - `dao` -> `dao`, `entities`, `config`, `utils` - `services` -> `services`, `dao`, `entities`, `config`, `utils` - `instances` -> `instances`, `services`, `dao`, `entities`, `config`, `utils` - `ui` -> `ui`, `instances`, `services`, `dao`, `entities`, `config`, `utils`
## 2. 目录与职责
### `src/utils` 通用能力与底层工具，供全项目复用。
- `ErrorNotifier.*`：统一错误上报出口（默认写入 `std::cerr`，可替换 sink）。 - `LiteDBUtils.*`：加密/哈希/编码等数据库底层能力。 - `PrefixTrie.*`：前缀匹配结构。 - `AppDirs.*`：运行目录解析与初始化。
### `src/entities` 领域实体层，负责结构化数据与序列化。
- 核心实体：`Chart.*`, `Rating.*`, `User.*`, `AdminUser.h`, `Json.*` - 视图/组合类型：`ChartSelectTypes.h`, `RecordViewTypes.h` - 实体序列化与扁平 JSON 读写：`Json.*`
### `src/config` 全局项目配置变量与配置状态类。
- `BasicConfig.*`：基础配置（locale、谱面目录、缓冲时间等）。 - `UserConfig.*`：用户配置（按键映射、主题、偏移等）。
### `src/dao` 与自制数据库交互（读写、验证、查询过滤）。
- `ProofedRecordsDAO.*`：防篡改成绩链（records/proof）。 - `UserAccountsDAO.*`：账号与密码摘要存储/校验。
### `src/services` 核心业务逻辑编排。
- `ChartIO.*`：谱面读取与事件解析。 - `SongPlayer.*`：音频加载与播放控制。 - `ConfigIO.*`：基础配置与用户配置读写。 - `I18n.*`：多语言资源加载。 - `UserService.*`：登录/注册与会话态管理。
### `src/instances` 前端 UI 与 services 的适配接口层（当前预留，待实现）。
### `src/ui` 终端前端界面层（当前预留，待实现）。
## 3. 本次整理结果
- 目录更名：`src/entites` -> `src/entities` - 层内重归类： - `AppDirs.*` 移至 `src/utils` - `JsonUtil.*` 能力已并入 `src/entities/Json.*` - `BasicConfig.*`、`UserConfig.*` 调整至 `src/config` - 依赖修正：移除 `dao` 对 `services` 的反向包含（`ProofedRecordsDAO` 不再依赖 `I18n`）
## 4. 约束检查
新增脚本：`tools/check_layer_includes.py`
用途：扫描 `src` 下 `#include`，检查是否违反“只能同层或后层包含前层”的规则。
运行：
```bash python3 tools/check_layer_includes.py ```
若出现违规，会输出 `文件:行号` 与违规方向，便于快速修正。

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# term4k
终端音游框架（C++20 / CMake），当前代码已按分层结构拆分，并支持用户级运行时设置持久化。
## 项目分层
依赖方向：
`(utils / entities / config) -> dao -> services -> instances -> ui`
- 允许：同层依赖、后层依赖前层 - 禁止：前层依赖后层 - 建议：UI 通过 `instances` 访问业务逻辑
## 目录职责
- `src/config` - `AppDirs.*`：运行目录解析（系统模式 / 用户模式） - `RuntimeConfigs.*`：运行时设置静态状态 + 按用户加载/保存 - `src/dao` - `UserAccountsDAO.*`：账号注册、登录校验 - `ProofedRecordsDAO.*`：成绩与验证数据读写 - `src/services` - `UserLoginService.*`：注册/登录/会话态 - `ChartIOService.*`：谱面解析与时间映射 - `AudioService.*`：音频播放 - `I18nService.*`：语言包加载 - `src/instances` - 面向 UI 的薄封装，组合 services 能力 - `src/utils` - `JsonUtils.*`、`PrefixTrie.*`、`LiteDBUtils.*`、`ErrorNotifier.*` - `test` - 按模块拆分的单元测试（Catch2）
## 运行时设置（RuntimeConfigs）
配置按用户落盘到：
- `<AppDirs::configDir()>/<username>_settings.json`
主要设置项：
- 外观：主题、语言 - 音频：音乐音量、打击音音量、缓冲区大小 - 游玩：Early/Late、AP/FC 指示、谱面偏移、谱面预加载时间、键位
会话策略：
- `Guest`：始终使用默认设置，不读写磁盘 - 普通用户：登录加载，登出保存 - `Admin`：支持个性化设置并持久化
## 构建与测试
### 构建主程序
```bash cmake -S . -B cmake-build-debug cmake --build cmake-build-debug --target term4k -j ```
### 构建并运行测试
```bash cmake -S . -B cmake-build-debug cmake --build cmake-build-debug --target term4k_tests -j cd cmake-build-debug ./term4k_tests ```
### 运行指定测试分组
```bash cd cmake-build-debug ./term4k_tests "[services][ChartIO]" ./term4k_tests "[services][UserService]" ./term4k_tests "[config][RuntimeConfigs]" ```
## 最近代码整理约定
- 在不引入冲突与歧义的前提下，优先使用 camelCase 变量命名 - 保留外部协议字段不变（例如 JSON key、`_settings.json` 文件名） - 注释聚焦“为什么这么做”，避免重复代码表意

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
